query:
INSERT INTO modifier_template_options (template_id, name, price, is_default, sort_order) VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Meat' LIMIT 1), 'Plain Chicken Fillet', '5.00', false, 0),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Meat' LIMIT 1), 'Spicy Chicken Fillet', '5.00', false, 1),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Meat' LIMIT 1), 'Southern Fried Chicken Fillet', '5.00', false, 2),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Meat' LIMIT 1), 'Chicken', '5.00', false, 3),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Meat' LIMIT 1), 'Turkey', '5.00', false, 4),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Meat' LIMIT 1), 'Ham', '4.00', false, 5),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Meat' LIMIT 1), 'Tuna & Sweetcorn', '4.00', false, 6);
